name: Kolaches
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and cream cheese in a food processor until smooth.
2. Gradually add the sifted flour, mixing just to blend.
3. Form the dough into a round ball and wrap in plastic wrap.
4. Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
5. Roll out the chilled dough on wax paper to about 1/8 inch thickness.
6. Cut rounds with a floured 2-inch cutter, starting from the center and cutting to the edge to minimize waste.
7. Place the rounds on an ungreased baking sheet.
8. Fill each round with a small amount of chosen jam in the center and press together gently.
9. Bake at 375°F for 15 minutes.
10. Sprinkle confectioner's sugar over the hot cookies, place a piece of wax paper on top, and sprinkle with more sugar.
11. Allow to cool on a rack.
Note: This recipe was provided by Gail Roberts and featured on PBS TV show on 12/11/93.
